Off Calendar May-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ERIK JONES, Esq. (Tel: 650-962-9452) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT INTER CITY METRO CLEANERS INC.'s Motion To Compel Depositions Of Larry Harrison And Greg Desilva Or Person Most Qualified At Overhead Door Company, Inc. Attendance And Testimony At Deposition.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and plaintiff's counsel authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Court to sign the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT INTER CITY METRO CLEANERS INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests:

The unopposed Motion is granted. Plaintiff shall provide complete, verified, objection-free responses to defendants' Form Interrogatories, Set Two, and Request for Admissions, Set One, within 10 days of the date of the hearing on this motion.

Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff Insurance Company of the West in the amount of $191.42, payable to defense counsel.

order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
